which-ramayana-character.title: Which Ramayana character are you?
which-ramayana-character.intro: Six quick questions reveal the Ramayana soul you carry. No signup needed — then share your result.

rama.name: Rama
rama.blurb: You hold to what is right even when it costs you. People trust your word like a promise carved in stone.

sita.name: Sita
sita.blurb: Gentle and unbreakable at once. You carry hardship with a grace that quietly outlasts every storm.

hanuman.name: Hanuman
hanuman.blurb: When someone you believe in needs you, no ocean is too wide and no mountain too heavy. Your strength kneels in service.

lakshmana.name: Lakshmana
lakshmana.blurb: You stand watch so the people you love can rest. Loyalty, for you, is something you live, not something you say.

bharata.name: Bharata
bharata.blurb: You'd hold a throne in trust rather than take what isn't yours. Humility and honesty are your quiet superpowers.

questions.q: A loved one asks you to give up something you have earned.

options.t: Honour the request without complaint — duty first.
Accept it, and quietly carry the weight for them.
Do it gladly if it serves someone I believe in.
Step back, but stay close to protect them.

questions.q: Beside the people you love, your natural role is to…

options.t: Lead and set the example.
Stand guard so they are safe.
Serve with my whole heart.
Keep things together while they are away.

questions.q: What do people most rely on you for?

options.t: Doing what is right, even when it is hard.
Quiet strength when things fall apart.
Showing up, no matter the distance or danger.
Loyalty you can stake your life on.

questions.q: Torn between duty and your own desire, you…

options.t: Choose duty, always.
Find the strength to bear the harder path.
Follow whatever lets me serve my purpose.
Guard the ones I love above all.

questions.q: Your real strength in tough times is…

options.t: Unshakable principle.
Patience and grace.
Courage and boundless energy.
Humility and restraint.
Keeping my word to them.
Staying faithful through every season.
Leaping any obstacle to help.
Serving their wishes before my own.
